query: Recent news about Nasdaq (nasdaq.com) in the last 6 months: product launches, funding rounds, acquisitions, and leadership or team hires in design, UX, research, or research operations. Also any open job postings for research, research ops, or design ops roles. Include source URLs and approximate dates.
answer:
### Executive Summary
Over the last six months, Nasdaq has heavily focused its product and platform strategy on artificial intelligence, culminating in the June 2026 launch of the Nasdaq Economic Institute and its inaugural AI research series. While the company has not completed any new acquisitions during this period, it has been highly active in venture funding, notably participating in a Series C round for Nasdaq Private Market that quadrupled the entity's valuation. To support its technological pivot, Nasdaq is actively expanding its design capabilities, specifically recruiting UX professionals in Atlanta to support its GenAI Platform team.

### Detailed Analysis

#### Product Launches and Platform Updates
Nasdaq has prioritized AI integration and institutional research capabilities in its recent product rollouts:
*   **Nasdaq Economic Institute**: On June 9, 2026, the company launched this new research platform designed to provide original research, expert analysis, and convenings for policymakers and market participants [FX News Group](https://fxnewsgroup.com/forex-news/exchanges/nasdaq-launches-nasdaq-economic-institute/). 
*   **AI Research Series**: Concurrently with the Institute's launch on June 9, 2026, Nasdaq debuted an inaugural AI research series. The first report focused on how generative AI accelerates new business formation and lowers barriers to entry for entrepreneurs [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/economy/policy/articles/nasdaq-launches-economic-institute-debuts-100000676.html).
*   **AI and Machine Learning Tools**: Nasdaq recently introduced generative AI tools for market surveillance, which detect complex manipulation patterns across asset classes in real time and have improved investigation efficiency by 30% [MatrixBCG.com](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/growth-strategy/nasdaq). Additionally, the company launched the machine-learning-driven Dynamic Midpoint Extended Life Order (M-ELO), which has increased institutional fill rates by approximately 22% compared to traditional order types [MatrixBCG.com](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/growth-strategy/nasdaq).
*   **Infrastructure Upgrades**: Nasdaq is currently updating its platform to move core exchange engines to AWS and Equinix LD4/NY11, aiming to provide elastic capacity and ultra-low latency [MatrixBCG.com](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/growth-strategy/nasdaq).

#### Venture Funding and Investments
Nasdaq has been active in both raising capital for its spin-offs and deploying capital through Nasdaq Ventures:
*   **Nasdaq Private Market (NPM) Series C**: On January 16, 2026, NPM closed a Series C financing round, achieving a valuation more than 4x higher than its 2024 Series B round [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/nasdaq-private-market-closes-series-140000986.html). Nasdaq deepened its commitment as an existing backer in this round, joining new investors Optiver and Cerity Partners [GlobeNewswire](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/01/16/3220344/0/en/Nasdaq-Private-Market-Closes-Series-C-Round-Marking-4x-Valuation-Step-up-Since-2024.html). This followed a December 11, 2025, strategic investment from Cerity Partners to form an exclusive wealth partnership [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/cerity-partners-announces-exclusive-partnership-with-nasdaq-private-market-to-expand-offerings-across-the-private-market-ecosystem-302638273.html).
*   **Nasdaq Ventures**: In late 2025, the venture arm made two notable investments: a strategic investment in Juniper Square's Series D-III round on September 5, 2025 [CB Insights](https://www.cbinsights.com/investor/nasdaq-ventures), and participation in a $136 million Series C round for financial software company Fnality on September 4, 2025 [PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/investor/179921-89).

#### Mergers, Acquisitions, and Partnerships
*   **Acquisitions**: As of January 2026, Nasdaq had completed zero acquisitions in the current calendar year [Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/acquisitions/acquisitions-by-nasdaq/__9JI4HtgEahMkjKvdgqx0Y0V4ZbbloXJeGdDEsDGzIH8). The company's most recent acquisitions occurred prior to the 6-month window, including Upland (July 2023) and Adenza (November 2023 for $10.5 billion) [Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/acquisitions/acquisitions-by-nasdaq/__9JI4HtgEahMkjKvdgqx0Y0V4ZbbloXJeGdDEsDGzIH8); [Investor Relations](https://ir.nasdaq.com/news-releases/news-release-details/nasdaq-completes-acquisition-adenza).
*   **Partnerships**: On November 26, 2025, Nasdaq AxiomSL announced an expanded RegTech deployment with Revolut to accelerate global growth [Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/acquisitions/acquisitions-by-nasdaq/__9JI4HtgEahMkjKvdgqx0Y0V4ZbbloXJeGdDEsDGzIH8).

#### UX, Design, and Research Operations
Nasdaq is actively expanding its design footprint, particularly in the Atlanta, GA market, to support its new AI initiatives:
*   **Open Roles**: Nasdaq is currently hiring a UX Product Designer for its GenAI Platform team in Atlanta, GA [ZipRecruiter](https://www.ziprecruiter.com/co/Nasdaq/Jobs/Ux-Designer). The company is also actively recruiting for a Junior UX Designer in Atlanta as of February 2026 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior-ux-designer-at-nasdaq-4336713225); [Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Job/atlanta-junior-ux-designer-jobs-SRCH_IL.0,7_IC1155583_KO8,26.htm).
*   **Design Leadership**: Jared Potter continues to serve as the Associate Vice President (AVP) of Enterprise UX, a position he has held since October 2018 [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jaredpotter). Potter manages designer cohorts capped at five members to provide hands-on experience, with new sessions added for January and February 2026 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jaredpotter/).
*   **Research Operations**: The Nasdaq Product Design team actively publishes insights and resources regarding UX Research and design techniques on Medium [Medium](https://medium.com/nasdaq-design/tagged/ux-research).

### Gaps and Limitations
*   **Leadership Hires**: The provided findings did not identify any *new* leadership hires in Design, UX, or Research within the last 6 months; the identified leader (Jared Potter) has been in his role since 2018.
*   **Specialized Roles**: No open job postings were found specifically containing the titles "Research Operations" (ResOps) or "Design Operations" (DesignOps), though general UX Research and UX Design roles were identified.
*   **Financial Terms**: Specific financial terms or investment amounts for Nasdaq's participation in the NPM Series C or the Juniper Square Series D-III were not disclosed in the provided data.
